ddls:
CREATE TABLE "payment_distributions" (
  "distribution_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each distribution entry */,
  "percentile_range" TEXT /* Range of the percentile (e.g., Top 1%, Top 2%) */,
  "percentage_of_recipients" REAL /* Percentage of recipients in the percentile */,
  "percentage_of_payments" REAL /* Percentage of total payments in the percentile */,
  "number_of_recipients" INTEGER /* Number of recipients in the percentile */,
  "total_payments_2020" TEXT /* Total payments made in 2020 for the percentile */,
  "average_payment_per_recipient" TEXT /* Average payment per recipient in the percentile */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Date and time when the record was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Date and time when the record was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("distribution_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "recipients" (
  "recipient_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each recipient */,
  "recipient_name" TEXT /* Name of the recipient */,
  "recipient_type" TEXT /* Type of the recipient (e.g., individual, business) */,
  "contact_email" TEXT /* Primary contact email for the recipient */,
  "secondary_contact" TEXT /* Secondary contact information for the recipient */,
  "address" TEXT /* Address of the recipient */,
  "phone_number" TEXT /* Phone number of the recipient */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Date and time when the record was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Date and time when the record was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("recipient_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_recipients_recipient_type FOREIGN KEY ("recipient_type") REFERENCES recipient_types ("type_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "payments" (
  "payment_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each payment */,
  "recipient_id" INTEGER /* ID of the recipient receiving the payment */,
  "payment_amount" TEXT /* Amount of the payment */,
  "payment_date" TEXT /* Date the payment was made */,
  "payment_method" TEXT /* Method of payment (e.g., wire transfer, check) */,
  "transaction_id" TEXT /* Unique transaction ID for the payment */,
  "payment_status" TEXT /* Status of the payment (e.g., pending, completed) */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Date and time when the record was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Date and time when the record was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("payment_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_payments_payment_method FOREIGN KEY ("payment_method") REFERENCES payment_methods ("method_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_payments_recipient_id FOREIGN KEY ("recipient_id") REFERENCES recipients ("recipient_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "recipient_percentiles" (
  "recipient_id" INTEGER /* ID of the recipient */,
  "percentile_range" TEXT /* Range of the percentile (e.g., Top 1%, Top 2%) */,
  "entry_date" TEXT /* Date the recipient entered the percentile */,
  "exit_date" TEXT /* Date the recipient exited the percentile (if applicable) */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Date and time when the record was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Date and time when the record was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("recipient_id", "percentile_range")
)

CREATE TABLE "payment_methods" (
  "method_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each payment method */,
  "method_name" TEXT /* Name of the payment method */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the payment method */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Date and time when the record was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Date and time when the record was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("method_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "recipient_types" (
  "type_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each recipient type */,
  "type_name" TEXT /* Name of the recipient type */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the recipient type */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Date and time when the record was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Date and time when the record was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("type_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "payment_history" (
  "history_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each payment history entry */,
  "recipient_id" INTEGER /* ID of the recipient */,
  "payment_id" INTEGER /* ID of the payment */,
  "payment_date" TEXT /* Date the payment was made */,
  "payment_amount" TEXT /* Amount of the payment */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Date and time when the record was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Date and time when the record was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("history_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_payment_history_recipient_id FOREIGN KEY ("recipient_id") REFERENCES recipients ("recipient_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_payment_history_payment_id FOREIGN KEY ("payment_id") REFERENCES payments ("payment_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "users" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "user_name" TEXT /* Full name of the user */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the user */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the user (e.g., analyst, manager, admin) */,
  "password" TEXT /* Password for the user */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Date and time when the record was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Date and time when the record was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_users_role FOREIGN KEY ("role") REFERENCES roles ("role_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "access_logs" (
  "access_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each access event */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user accessing the data */,
  "payment_id" INTEGER /* ID of the payment being accessed */,
  "access_date" TEXT /* Date when the payment was accessed */,
  "access_type" TEXT /* Type of access (e.g., view, download) */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Date and time when the record was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Date and time when the record was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("access_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_access_logs_payment_id FOREIGN KEY ("payment_id") REFERENCES payments ("payment_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_access_logs_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "percentile_definitions" (
  "percentile_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each percentile range */,
  "percentile_range" TEXT /* Range of the percentile (e.g., Top 1%, Top 2%) */,
  "lower_bound" REAL /* Lower bound of the percentile range */,
  "upper_bound" REAL /* Upper bound of the percentile range */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the percentile range */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Date and time when the record was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Date and time when the record was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("percentile_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "roles" (
  "role_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each role */,
  "role_name" TEXT /* Name of the role */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the role */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Date and time when the record was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Date and time when the record was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("role_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "user_roles" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user */,
  "role_id" INTEGER /* ID of the role */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Date and time when the record was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Date and time when the record was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id", "role_id")
)
